Short CV

Asst. Prof. Elvan ÇİFTÇİ was born in 1988. She completed her undergraduate education in Hacettepe University Faculty of Medicine in 2012. Later, she completed her medical specialty education in the field of Neuroscience in Hacettepe University in 2020. Nowadays, Elvan ÇİFTÇİ works as Assistant Professor in the Faculty of Medicine Department of Psychiatry.
